---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement — please read CONTRIBUTING.md first for what's in scope.
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do? What's painful about the current behaviour? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like to happen? A short sketch is fine. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you worked around this? How? -->

## Scope check

This project's contribution scope is narrow (it's research code released alongside a paper). Please confirm your request is one of:

- [ ] Bug fix or robustness improvement
- [ ] New adversarial evaluation scenario
- [ ] Reproducibility / pinning / CI enhancement
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Port to different GPU / hardware

Out-of-scope items (character/voice changes, new base models as PRs to this repo) will be closed — please fork.
